full_text:
Li Ru 李儒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Ru (李儒). Served Dong Zhuo as an advisor. Died with his lord’s ambitions. Li Ru was affiliated with Dong Zhuo.
